title: schizonepeta multifida
intro: Schizonepeta multifida, also known as Ba Jiao Hua Shan, is a flowering plant native to China, known for its medicinal properties and various health benefits. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The plant's extracts are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoid saponins, which contribute to its medicinal effects and provide relief from health conditions such as hypertension, arthritis, and respiratory infections. Schizonepeta multifida can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
